title: Magnetism, Marquees, Bento, Scramble, ⌘K
description: Five hot UI patterns from the design web — magnetic buttons, infinite marquee, bento spotlight, text scramble, and a command palette.

drops.title: Magnetic Cursor Buttons
drops.description: Spring-physics buttons that bend toward your cursor with a soft glowing blob follower.
drops.concept: The portfolio-trend of 2025: stiffness/damping springs attract buttons into the cursor's gravity well. Includes a debug panel for tuning all 4 spring parameters live.
drops.source: Pattern popularized across GitHub (nicholasgasior/magnetic-button, Bruno Simon, codrops)

drops.title: Infinite Marquee + Fade
drops.description: CSS-only horizontal scroll with mask-faded edges — the trick behind every modern logo wall.
drops.concept: Three marquee tracks at different tempos and directions, with `mask-image` linear-gradient creating clean fade edges. Hover-to-pause via `animation-play-state`. Switch global speed with one click.

interaction.click: Tap a speed button to change tempo

drops.title: Bento Spotlight Grid
drops.description: Apple-style bento grid where each card has a radial gradient + glowing border edge tracking the cursor.
drops.concept: Two effects layered with CSS custom properties: a 400px radial gradient background that follows the pointer, and a 1px border-light that uses `mask-composite: exclude` to glow on the nearest edge. Cards near (but not under) the cursor also brighten subtly.

interaction.mouse: Move across cards to paint spotlight

drops.title: Text Scramble
drops.description: Letters cycle through random glyphs before settling — 5 speed variants, custom input, cascade-all trigger.
drops.concept: Classic text-scramble engine: each letter has a start/end frame and a transitional state where it cycles random characters. Per-row speed presets (slow, fast, snap, cascade, binary). Type your own line to scramble it.
drops.source: Justin Windle / soulwire's original text scramble pen, recreated

drops.title: Command Palette ⌘K
drops.description: The Linear / Raycast pattern — fuzzy search, grouped results, keyboard navigation, smooth open/close.
drops.concept: Every modern app has one. This isolates the core mechanics: subsequence-based fuzzy match, ↑↓ keyboard nav, ⌘K/`/` global shortcuts, Esc to close, smooth spring scale-in animation, recent-action history, and a toast confirmation on selection.
